title: Custom Typeclass
code:
class Describable a where
  describe :: a -> String

data Shape
  = Circle Double
  | Rectangle Double Double
  deriving (Show)

instance Describable Shape where
  describe (Circle r) =
    "Circle with radius " ++ show r
  describe (Rectangle w h) =
    "Rectangle " ++ show w ++ " x " ++ show h

instance Describable Int where
  describe n = "The integer " ++ show n

main :: IO ()
main = mapM_ (putStrLn . describe) [Circle 5.0, Rectangle 3.0 4.0]
description: Defines a `Describable` typeclass with a single method, then provides instances for `Shape` and `Int`. Typeclasses enable ad-hoc polymorphism — similar to interfaces but resolved at compile time via dictionary passing.
